creator: freebsd@amc-os.com
text:
Hi,

Here are below the results of devinfo -rv and verbose dmesg for each kernel.
I also pointed the differences between dmesg, but there doesn't seem to be 
any major one between them, except that as amdpm didn't attach, it created 
sysresource0 with the same I/O ports. I'll try to build another kernel to 
figure out any difference.

Thanks for your help,
Aurélien

--
